IBB MASTER

IBB MASTER Master Every Subject. Ace the JAIBB Exam.

Your complete JAIBB BPE preparation platform — all 6 official IBB textbooks embedded as knowledge, live AI tutoring powered by Claude. Covers Economics, OM, MAFS, Banking Law, BCFI, and Basic Accounting — 200+ practice questions, 120+ flashcards, 50+ MCQs, 30+ probable questions, and a complete Past Papers archive (84th–7th BPE, 2016–2026). v23 · Exam Simulation · 8th BPE 2026 · Cross-Subject Quiz

Subject Progress
Choose Your Subject
Each subject module contains practice questions, flashcards, quizzes, past papers, and AI-generated model answers.
📈
ECON · Microeconomics & Macroeconomics
Principles of Economics
All 7 POE textbook modules embedded: demand/supply, consumer theory, production & cost, market structures, market failure, macroeconomics, and Bangladesh economy.
46+ Questions 12 Topics POE Full Textbook
🏛️
OM · Management & Organisation
Org. & Management
Management theories, leadership, motivation (Maslow, Herzberg, McClelland), HRM, delegation, control, business ethics, and organizational structure.
40+ Questions 6 Topics Flashcards
🏦
MAFS · Monetary & Financial Systems
Monetary & Finance
Bangladesh Bank, money supply, RTGS, BEFTN, Islamic banking, bond pricing, BOP, foreign exchange, NBFIs, and microfinance.
35+ Questions BPE Papers 🧮 Calculators
⚖️
LAW · Banking & Finance Law
Banking Law
NI Act 1881, MLPA 2012, Artha Rin Adalat, mortgage, pledge, banker-customer relationship, HDC, BFIU, and banking regulations.
45+ Questions 11 Topics Flashcards
✉️
BCFI · Business Communication & IT
Bus. Comm. & IT
Report writing, letter drafting, persuasive communication, banking correspondence, IT concepts, and presentation skills.
25+ Questions 3 Topics Bookmarks
📒
BA · Basic Accounting
Basic Accounting
Full IBB textbook by Md. Shahid Ullah PhD — 6 modules: Introduction, Recording & Processing, Financial Statements, Entity Accounts, Bank Financial Statements, Other Entities. Includes IAS/IFRS, double-entry, depreciation, ratio analysis.
41+ Questions 90+ Flashcards 50+ MCQs

Exam Intelligence
Probable Next Exam Questions
High-probability questions for the 8th BPE 2026 — based on 7th BPE actual paper analysis, frequency patterns, syllabus gaps, and examiner trends. Each comes with a full model answer from the IBB textbooks.
Exam Archive
Past Papers — All Exams
Complete question bank from IBB Banking Professional Examinations (JAIBB), including the actual 7th BPE 2026 paper (POE), covering the new syllabus (96th–7th BPE) and classic syllabus (84th–95th). Answer any 5 of 10 questions. Full model answers via AI Tutor.
